refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed into minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery to address both prevention and mitigation aspects of availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: Minimize unplanned downtime of NGHE solution
Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

candidate_dps: Redundant system components and fault-tolerant design
Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance
Automated fault detection and recovery procedures
selected_dp.selected_dp: Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance combined with automated fault detection and recovery procedures

potential_sources: Health monitoring tightly coupled with fault recovery logic
Dependency on telemetry data for real-time status
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP integrates monitoring and recovery to reduce coupling with external modules by localizing availability management.

assumptions_risks: Risk of incomplete fault coverage in automated recovery
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing fault detection and recovery to separate concerns if complexity grows.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system availability management including monitoring, fault detection, and recovery logic

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time operational data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts related to availability impacting safety events to Safety Services

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and remote modules for status and control

module_containment_scores.notes: Core availability logic centralized here, minimal diffusion
Vehicle provides telemetry data but does not contain availability logic
Teleoperation impacts availability but logic not contained here
Receives alerts but does not implement availability functions

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability management in NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Interface dependencies on telemetry and safety alert must be robust
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth and consider splitting availability submodules if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing both monitoring and recovery aspects of availability.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk as availability logic is centralized
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support the NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified via operational data and system logs collected through Telemetry interface.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability functions to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Track complexity of NGHE Solution module to avoid overloading
Validate robustness of Telemetry and SafetyAlert interfaces

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, feasible, and meet the availability KPI requirement with clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize unplanned downtime of NGHE solution
Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

revise.why: No immediate revisions needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely
Automated recovery covers critical fault scenarios
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Operational availability data from field trials
Validation reports on fault detection and recovery effectiveness
